scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points: integrate(), wait() with all_active(), remove_relation(), via parameter, AppStatusRelation fields, endpoint syntax. Matches gold standard well.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'via' parameter description says it takes a CIDR for cross-model traffic routing — gold standard only says 'via parameter available for cross-model relations' without specifying CIDR semantics. Minor potential inaccuracy but plausible. Also adds jubilant.all_blocked() and is_blocked which aren't in gold standard but are reasonable jubilant API elements. The assert example code is reasonable but not verified against gold standard.
